text:
It was a beautiful, summer night. The sky was a canvas of twinkling stars. I was out for a walk, feeling grateful for my good health. Just as I was about to turn the corner onto a quieter street, I saw him. He was tall and lean, a big old Great Dane. He lifted his enormous head, gray ears flopping to one side, and grinned at me.

"Oh my!" I thought. He had big black eyes that sparkled like small gemstones. I couldn't help but approach, intending to speak nice words.

"Hello there," I said warmly. "You're quite the magnificent beast."

He gave me a silly little chuckle. In fact, I could kind of laugh along. It felt good to talk to someone so friendly.

We walked on for a while. I admired the stars twinkling overhead. He seemed to enjoy my company immensely.
